prompt: Compare average grades between winter and summer semesters

inputData.question: Compare average grades between winter and summer semesters

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Compare average grades between winter and summer semesters"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Compare average grades between winter and summer semesters"},"startedAt":1771855673892,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to compare average grades between winter and summer semesters. I've confirmed the schema has:
- grades table with exam_score, project_score, attendance_score columns
- enrollments table linking students to course_sections
- course_sections table with semester_type (WINTER or SUMMER)

I'll calculate the average of the three score components (exam, project, attendance) for each semester type. Since these are numeric scores, I'll compute their mean and group by semester_type from course_sections.","sql":"SELECT 
  cs.semester_type,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_score
FROM grades g
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.semester_type
ORDER BY cs.semester_type;","assumptions":["Grades are composed of exam_score, project_score, and attendance_score","Overall average is calculated as the mean of the three score components","NULL scores are treated as 0 in the overall calculation","Semester types are WINTER and SUMMER as confirmed in the database"]},"endedAt":1771855719663},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT 
  cs.semester_type,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,

  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_score
FROM grades g
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.semester_type
ORDER BY cs.semester_type;"},"startedAt":1771855719666,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

FROM grades g
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.semester_type
ORDER BY cs.semester_type","metadata":{"columns":["semester_type","avg_exam_score","avg_project_score","avg_attendance_score","avg_overall_score"],"rowCount":2,"sample":[{"semester_type":"WINTER","avg_exam_score":"47.73","avg_project_score":"49.98","avg_attendance_score":"57.56","avg_overall_score":"43.26"},{"semester_type":"SUMMER","avg_exam_score":"51.79","avg_project_score":"44.97","avg_attendance_score":"55.65","avg_overall_score":"45.34"}]},"data":[{"semester_type":"WINTER","avg_exam_score":"47.73","avg_project_score":"49.98","avg_attendance_score":"57.56","avg_overall_score":"43.26"},{"semester_type":"SUMMER","avg_exam_score":"51.79","avg_project_score":"44.97","avg_attendance_score":"55.65","avg_overall_score":"45.34"}]},"endedAt":1771855719674},"visualize":{"payload":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

visualization.title: Average Grades Comparison: Winter vs Summer Semesters

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.semester_type,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.attendance_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  ROUND(AVG((COALESCE(g.exam_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.project_score, 0) + COALESCE(g.attendance_score, 0)) / 3)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_score
FROM grades g
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
GROUP BY cs.semester_type
ORDER BY cs.semester_type;

issues: Encoding field 'score_value' is missing in SQL output columns.
Encoding field 'score_type' is missing in SQL output columns.
